title: Assembly Assembled | Server
description: A server pack for the Assembly Assembled Modpack, to make server construction even easier
body: This pack is intended to be used as a server pack for the Assembly Assembled modpack. This pack removes client side mods from the main pack, as to allow fewer compatibility and run issues. While this pack isnt, by itself, a server, it is updated to work with docker images to make that process easier to install. For all intents and purposes, this pack will maintain parity to the main pack.
